text: The credit agreement dated 15 January 2024 between Deutsche Bank AG (the 'Lender'), a commercial bank incorporated in Germany, and TechCorp GmbH (the 'Borrower') provides for a revolving credit facility of EUR 50,000,000.
BNP Paribas S.A., acting as agent bank, represents a syndicate of seventeen European financial institutions in the transaction.
The Borrower, Acme Holdings Ltd, is a special purpose vehicle registered in Luxembourg with LEI code 549300ABCDEF123456.
Goldman Sachs International, as the underwriting bank, has agreed to purchase up to USD 200 million of senior unsecured notes issued by Meridian Energy Corp.
The subsidiary, Westbridge Financial Services S.A., wholly owned by Westbridge Group PLC, acts as guarantor for all obligations under this agreement.
